description: Characteristic real MegaETH mainnet transactions, captured offline (RPC responses + on-chain receipt), for the replay-throughput benchmark. Each case replays one transaction in isolation; see run.py and README.md.

cases.name: system_call
cases.note: Call into a 0x6342… system contract — exercises interceptor dispatch and volatile-data/oracle paths.

cases.name: medium_call
cases.note: Medium contract call with no logs — baseline compute + a few SLOAD/SSTORE.

cases.name: log_heavy
cases.note: 12 logs — exercises LOG opcodes and the dual (compute + storage) gas metering on topics/data.

cases.name: large_defi
cases.note: Large multi-call DeFi transaction — deep call stack, many storage writes, the heaviest case.

cases.name: attack_deploy
cases.note: Real mainnet attack contract deployment captured as a self-contained prestate fixture (not a mined tx; converted from crates/mega-evm/benches/fixtures/known_attack_deploy.json, #299). 142M gas of CREATE — the heaviest stress on the multi-dimensional AdditionalLimit accounting. Demonstrates the fixture-input path: no RPC / archive node, any conformant JSON works.
